name: Working Dir
description: Create Pyrds working directories under the configured pyrds root.

name: Computing
description: Compute pricing workflows using direct payloads or QML files from a Pyrds working directory.

name: Backtest
description: Run full-QML backtests from scenario folders in a Pyrds working directory.

name: Stress
description: Run stress pricing workflows using compact stress definitions and QML request mutation.

name: Qlib
description: Run Qlib version regression validation and optional Excel comparison dumps.

name: Overrides
description: Run structured QML override scenarios for OT and full-QML pricing.

name: Results
description: Parse large pricing result XML files into JSON and optional Excel outputs.
